notes: Initial self-stage job 3246927 failed because the compute-node staging path depended on rg. Repaired relaunch 3250526 was canceled during the capped-window stop. The June 22 repacked submission 3250784 was then canceled again after the strict heat-balance gate was raised: the insulation-only wave has no defensible <2 W 3D residual guarantee under the current fixed-Q cooling contract, so it was removed from queue instead of being relaunched as-is.
